conversation_history.content: The patient's diagnosis was not found in the retrieved medical or claim documents.
No matching document was found to summarize. Please provide a document ID or a more specific document type.
Tell me a joke about databases.
I am set up to answer questions, summarize documents, and perform calculations over the document collection. Please ask about an invoice, claim, contract, report, or a calculation.
The quarterly revenue was not found in the retrieved documents. The documents available are invoices, which detail specific transactions but do not provide a summary of quarterly revenue.
